from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class ApplybrokerTerminalAdapter:
    """Generated adapter for ApplyBroker.\n\n    Terminal type: rest_gateway\n    Docs summary: REST gateway API.\n    Docs excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/docs place order cancel order positions\n    Search excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/search?q=positions place order cancel order positions\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['APPLY_BROKER_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        headers = {"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
        if self.api_key:
            headers["X-API-Key"] = self.api_key
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        body = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
        request = Request(url, data=body, headers=headers, method=method.upper())
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        return json.loads(content)

    def ping(self) -> dict:
        return {"ok": True, "terminal": self.base_url}

    def place_order(self, symbol: str, side: str, quantity: float, order_type: str = "limit", limit_price: float | None = None) -> dict:
        payload = {
            "symbol": symbol,
            "side": side,
            "quantity": quantity,
            "order_type": order_type,
            "limit_price": limit_price,
        }
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders", payload=payload)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders/cancel", payload={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_order_status(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "orders/status", params={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_positions(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "positions")

    def fetch_balances(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "account/balances")

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class ApplybrokerTerminalAdapter:
    """Generated adapter for ApplyBroker.\n\n    Terminal type: rest_gateway\n    Docs summary: REST gateway API.\n    Docs excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/docs place order cancel order positions\n    Search excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/search?q=positions place order cancel order positions\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['APPLY_BROKER_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        headers = {"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
        if self.api_key:
            headers["X-API-Key"] = self.api_key
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        body = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
        request = Request(url, data=body, headers=headers, method=method.upper())
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        return json.loads(content)

    def ping(self) -> dict:
        return {"ok": True, "terminal": self.base_url}

    def place_order(self, symbol: str, side: str, quantity: float, order_type: str = "limit", limit_price: float | None = None) -> dict:
        payload = {
            "symbol": symbol,
            "side": side,
            "quantity": quantity,
            "order_type": order_type,
            "limit_price": limit_price,
        }
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders", payload=payload)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders/cancel", payload={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_order_status(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "orders/status", params={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_positions(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "positions")

    def fetch_balances(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "account/balances")

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class ApplybrokerTerminalAdapter:
    """Generated adapter for ApplyBroker.\n\n    Terminal type: rest_gateway\n    Docs summary: REST gateway API.\n    Docs excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/docs place order cancel order positions\n    Search excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/search?q=positions place order cancel order positions\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['APPLY_BROKER_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        headers = {"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
        if self.api_key:
            headers["X-API-Key"] = self.api_key
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        body = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
        request = Request(url, data=body, headers=headers, method=method.upper())
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        return json.loads(content)

    def ping(self) -> dict:
        return {"ok": True, "terminal": self.base_url}

    def place_order(self, symbol: str, side: str, quantity: float, order_type: str = "limit", limit_price: float | None = None) -> dict:
        payload = {
            "symbol": symbol,
            "side": side,
            "quantity": quantity,
            "order_type": order_type,
            "limit_price": limit_price,
        }
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders", payload=payload)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders/cancel", payload={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_order_status(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "orders/status", params={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_positions(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "positions")

    def fetch_balances(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "account/balances")

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class ApplybrokerTerminalAdapter:
    """Generated adapter for ApplyBroker.\n\n    Terminal type: rest_gateway\n    Docs summary: REST gateway API.\n    Docs excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/docs place order cancel order positions\n    Search excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/search?q=positions place order cancel order positions\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['APPLY_BROKER_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        headers = {"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
        if self.api_key:
            headers["X-API-Key"] = self.api_key
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        body = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
        request = Request(url, data=body, headers=headers, method=method.upper())
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        return json.loads(content)

    def ping(self) -> dict:
        return {"ok": True, "terminal": self.base_url}

    def place_order(self, symbol: str, side: str, quantity: float, order_type: str = "limit", limit_price: float | None = None) -> dict:
        payload = {
            "symbol": symbol,
            "side": side,
            "quantity": quantity,
            "order_type": order_type,
            "limit_price": limit_price,
        }
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders", payload=payload)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders/cancel", payload={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_order_status(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "orders/status", params={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_positions(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "positions")

    def fetch_balances(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "account/balances")

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from urllib.parse import urlencode
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen


class ApplybrokerTerminalAdapter:
    """Generated adapter for ApplyBroker.\n\n    Terminal type: rest_gateway\n    Docs summary: REST gateway API.\n    Docs excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/docs place order cancel order positions\n    Search excerpt: terminal docs for https://example.com/search?q=positions place order cancel order positions\n    """

    def __init__(self, base_url: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 10) -> None:
        self.base_url = (base_url or "https://api.example.com").rstrip("/")
        self.api_keys = [os.getenv(name, "") for name in ['APPLY_BROKER_KEY']]
        self.api_key = next((value for value in self.api_keys if value), "")
        self.timeout_seconds = timeout_seconds

    def _request_json(self, method: str, path: str, params: dict[str, str] | None = None, payload: dict | None = None) -> dict:
        params = dict(params or {})
        headers = {"User-Agent": "Sentinel-Alpha/0.1", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
        if self.api_key:
            headers["X-API-Key"] = self.api_key
        url = f"{self.base_url}/{path.lstrip('/')}"
        if params:
            url = f"{url}?{urlencode(params)}"
        body = None if payload is None else json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')
        request = Request(url, data=body, headers=headers, method=method.upper())
        with urlopen(request, timeout=self.timeout_seconds) as response:
            content = response.read().decode('utf-8')
        return json.loads(content)

    def ping(self) -> dict:
        return {"ok": True, "terminal": self.base_url}

    def place_order(self, symbol: str, side: str, quantity: float, order_type: str = "limit", limit_price: float | None = None) -> dict:
        payload = {
            "symbol": symbol,
            "side": side,
            "quantity": quantity,
            "order_type": order_type,
            "limit_price": limit_price,
        }
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders", payload=payload)

    def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("POST", "orders/cancel", payload={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_order_status(self, order_id: str) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "orders/status", params={"order_id": order_id})

    def fetch_positions(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "positions")

    def fetch_balances(self) -> dict:
        return self._request_json("GET", "account/balances")
